enrichment.summary: Kyle records a catch-up vlog for the previous day, mentioning he spent most of his time working on a Rome-related project (likely a map or model in Google Earth), bought a DVD player to make CDs playable on his MacBook, and watched a Netflix documentary about Rome. He briefly critiques the documentary's historical inaccuracies around character ages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it interesting but notes significant historical inaccuracies in character ages
Wants to record vlogs in the morning but struggles to maintain the habit

claims.claim: I was supposed to do this video yesterday but forgot.

claims.subject: documentary
claims.claim: Mark Zuckerberg is only nine years older than Lucilla in real life.

claims.subject: documentary
claims.claim: In the documentary, the actor playing Mark Zuckerberg is about 30 years older than Lucilla.

claims.subject: documentary
claims.claim: Lucilla was only 13 when she died, but in the documentary, she appears to be about 30.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to start doing vlogs in the morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to figure out some technical issues before I can continue.
